mapper.sql: r.visit_state IN (3, 5, 6) AND r.id NOT BETWEEN 1001 AND 1005

AND ( EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ai_follow_up_record fr WHERE fr.register_id = r.id ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ai_follow_up_plan ap WHERE ap.register_id = r.id ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM medical_record mr INNER JOIN medical_record_disease mrd ON mrd.medical_record_id = mr.id WHERE mr.register_id = r.id ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM medical_record mr WHERE mr.register_id = r.id ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM patient_health_observation pho WHERE pho.register_id = r.id ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM inspection_request ir WHERE ir.register_id = r.id AND ir.inspection_result IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(ir.inspection_result) <> '' ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM check_request cr WHERE cr.register_id = r.id AND cr.check_result IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(cr.check_result) <> '' ) )
mapper.select: SELECT s.id AS "id", s.register_id AS "registerId", s.department_id AS "departmentId", s.schedule_date AS "scheduleDate", s.item_type AS "itemType", s.title AS "title", s.status AS "status", s.created_by AS "createdBy" FROM follow_up_day_schedule s WHERE s.id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT id AS "id", register_id AS "registerId", observation_date AS "observationDate", observed_by AS "observedBy", confirmed_at AS "confirmedAt", note AS "note" FROM follow_up_daily_observation WHERE register_id = #{registerId} AND observation_date = #{observationDate} LIMIT 1

SELECT e.id AS "employeeId", e.realname AS "realName", d.dept_name AS "departmentName", d.id AS "departmentId" FROM employee e LEFT JOIN department d ON d.id = e.deptment_id WHERE e.id = #{employeeId} LIMIT 1
SELECT deptment_id FROM register WHERE id = #{registerId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO follow_up_patient_profile ( register_id, department_id, priority_level, interview_interval_days, observation_interval_days ) VALUES ( #{registerId}, #{departmentId}, COALESCE(#{priorityLevel}, 'normal'), COALESCE(#{interviewIntervalDays}, 7), COALESCE(#{observationIntervalDays}, 1) ) ON CONFLICT (register_id) DO UPDATE SET department_id = EXCLUDED.department_id, priority_level = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.priority_level, follow_up_patient_profile.priority_level), interview_interval_days = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.interview_interval_days, follow_up_patient_profile.interview_interval_days), observation_interval_days = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.observation_interval_days, follow_up_patient_profile.observation_interval_days)

INSERT INTO follow_up_enrollment ( register_id, managing_department_id, priority_level, interview_interval_days, observation_interval_days, enrolled_by, status ) VALUES ( #{registerId}, #{departmentId}, COALESCE(#{priorityLevel}, 'normal'), COALESCE(#{interviewIntervalDays}, 7), COALESCE(#{observationIntervalDays}, 1), #{enrolledBy}, 'active' ) ON CONFLICT (register_id) DO UPDATE SET managing_department_id = EXCLUDED.managing_department_id, priority_level = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.priority_level, follow_up_enrollment.priority_level), interview_interval_days = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.interview_interval_days, follow_up_enrollment.interview_interval_days), observation_interval_days = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.observation_interval_days, follow_up_enrollment.observation_interval_days), enrolled_by = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.enrolled_by, follow_up_enrollment.enrolled_by), status = 'active'
mapper.select: SELECT fp.register_id AS "registerId", fp.department_id AS "departmentId", fp.priority_level AS "priorityLevel", fp.interview_interval_days AS "interviewIntervalDays", fp.observation_interval_days AS "observationIntervalDays", fp.enrolled_at AS "enrolledAt", true AS "enrolled" FROM follow_up_patient_profile fp WHERE fp.register_id = #{registerId} LIMIT 1
